vibe: Industrial, technical rigor, precise, structural clarity, high-end electrical contractor

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase

layout.spacing_system: Generous - p-8, p-12, p-24. High negative space to evoke premium feel.
layout.grid_strategy: Tetris Bento Grid for marketing. Asymmetrical grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12. gap-8.
layout.containers: Hard edges, border-white/10, no rounded corners. Industrial tech feel.

motion.hover: High contrast shifts. border-white/10 to border-brand/50. text-zinc-400 to text-white.
motion.scroll: Lenis smooth scroll (momentum) to feel premium. Framer motion for subtle reveal of bento grid cards.

surfaces.cards: Flat background (bg-zinc-900/50), 1px solid border (border-white/5). Hover adds faint brand colored glow.
surfaces.header: Crystal glassmorphism: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5.
surfaces.buttons: Square edges, sharp. Primary: bg-[#FFD60A] text-black hover:bg-[#FFC300]. Secondary: border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-black.

components.hero: Asymmetrical layout. Large typography intersecting with abstract/industrial imagery. Max overlay bg-black/50 or subtle gradient.
components.services_showcase: Bento grid (Tetris Mode). Dense text, large image cutouts. Sharp corners.
components.gallery: Grid with hover-reveal captions. Monotone images turning full color on hover.
components.testimonials: Editorial layout. Large quote marks, generous p-12 padding. Subtle borders.
components.contact_form: Minimalist inputs, border-b only (no full box). Custom Shadcn Form.

hero_bg.description: Abstract electrical/industrial lines glowing in the dark.

services_panel.description: An electrician testing an electrical panel

services_commercial.description: Modern architecture ceiling with exposed conduits/lighting

gallery_residential.description: Modern home exterior lighting at night

gallery_ev.description: EV Charger connected to a modern vehicle

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'lucide-react' for icons. Opt for sharp, technical icons.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the marketing layout, avoiding standard Shadcn 'Cards'.
Use Shadcn strictly for interactive logic (Contact Form, Admin Table, Dialogs).
For the admin route (/admin), use a dense 'Control Room' grid layout.
Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, links, form inputs, and key sections.
Never use placeholders. Use the provided image_urls for all media.
Adhere to the H1 scale maximum: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl. DO NOT exceed.
